projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: v1.11.2 — Xcode Cloud build SPM error fixed: the CI script now disables Swift Package Manager so the build resolves via CocoaPods. Pushed (79b6813).
projects.nextStep: Re-run the GRDN Xcode Cloud build — it should get past the post-clone step now.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: Two real scans gave 185mm and 274mm from near-identical photos — paper detection is unstable, swinging the scale. Now debugging the pipeline against Jeremy's real photo.
projects.nextStep: Claude is fixing paper detection against the real photo. A bigger reference sheet (foot fully on it) would also help reliability.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Daily transit loop live; moon-phase visual added; transit accuracy verified against Swiss Ephemeris (matches at gate + line precision).
projects.nextStep: Reviewing the TestFlight build; pick the next vision phase (social layer, daily-loop notifications, or swiping go-live).

projects.name: irons-design
projects.note: Live on Cloudflare — resolving with valid SSL and the correct content.

projects.name: WEATHER
projects.note: App Store rejection (ITMS-90129) fixed; Mirror exercise now has a close button on every step. Code-complete at v1.3.0.
projects.nextStep: Confirm build 22 reached TestFlight and resubmit to App Store review.

projects.name: POSTURE
projects.note: Auto-capture (hands-free 4-view camera) shipped. Supabase keep-alive is running green — the project won't auto-pause anymore.
projects.nextStep: Smoke-test the auto-capture flow in Expo Go on your iPhone.

projects.name: Futon
projects.note: Homepage Progress section (rainbow SRS bars) shipped. The 'Burned' SRS state renamed to 'Perfected' across the UI — staged.
projects.nextStep: Greenlight the 'Perfected' rename to commit it.
